shadow.field:
// 在Exec Script顶部添加（全局变量）
if (typeof noodleTime === 'undefined') noodleTime = 0;
noodleTime += 0.05; // 动画速度

const canvasTex = puzzles.canvasTextures['noodle_canvas'];
const canvas = canvasTex.image;
const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");

// ... 你的背景代码不变 ...

// 【动态面条】波浪运动
ctx.strokeStyle = '#F4A460';
ctx.lineWidth = 15;
ctx.lineCap = 'round';
ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
ctx.beginPath();

// 动态关键点（用sin函数）
ctx.moveTo(40, 140 + 5*Math.sin(noodleTime));
ctx.quadraticCurveTo(
 90 + 5*Math.sin(noodleTime + 1), 
 90 + 10*Math.sin(noodleTime + 2), 
 140 + 5*Math.sin(noodleTime + 0.5)
);
ctx.quadraticCurveTo(
 200 + 8*Math.sin(noodleTime + 1.5), 
 80 + 15*Math.sin(noodleTime + 3), 
 260 + 5*Math.sin(noodleTime + 2.5)
);
ctx.stroke();

// 【动态酱汁】滴落晃动
ctx.strokeStyle = '#FF6347';
ctx.lineWidth = 5;
ctx.lineCap = 'round';
ctx.beginPath();
ctx.moveTo(80 + 2*Math.sin(noodleTime), 140);
ctx.lineTo(75 + 3*Math.cos(noodleTime*2), 170);
ctx.lineTo(72 + Math.sin(noodleTime*1.5), 195);

// 右边酱汁
ctx.moveTo(220 + Math.sin(noodleTime*1.2), 125);
ctx.lineTo(228 + 2*Math.cos(noodleTime), 160);
ctx.lineTo(232 + Math.sin(noodleTime*0.8), 185);
ctx.stroke();

// 【眨眼动画】
const eyeScale = 1 + 0.1 * Math.sin(noodleTime * 4);
ctx.save();
ctx.scale(eyeScale, eyeScale);
ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
ctx.shadowColor = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';
ctx.shadowBlur = 3;
ctx.beginPath();
ctx.arc(110, 90, 18, 0, Math.PI*2);
ctx.arc(230, 85, 18, 0, Math.PI*2);
ctx.fill();
ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
ctx.restore();

// ... 你的其他眼睛、嘴巴、腮红代码不变 ...

canvasTex.needsUpdate = true;
